description: Quadcopter drone chassis in an H-frame configuration, lying flat on the XY plane with 3mm thickness, featuring two side rails, a center plate, four circular motor mounts, and eight drilled holes.
notes: Ensure the coordinate origin (0,0,0) is at the exact center of the frame on the bottom face (Z=0). The bounding box extends from X = -91 to +91 and Y = -41 to +41 due to the 22mm diameter motor mounts centered at (+/-80, +/-30). Use boolean operations to cleanly merge the rails, center plate, and mounts before subtracting the 8 through-holes.
